overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic open-world game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in Western attire walking along a forest trail during an overcast day. The character encounters a horse rider, experiences a rain shower, and stops at a cliff edge to overlook a vast forested valley before continuing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with rock wall

events.description: horse rider overtakes the character on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow forest trail

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback passing by on the right side of the path

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining both sides of the forest trail
steep rocky slope covered in vegetation rising on the right side
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense pine forest. A rider on horseback overtakes from behind on the right side. The path is bordered by a rocky embankment on the right and tall trees on both sides under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail opening toward cliff vista

events.description: rain begins to fall, gradually increasing in intensity

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as rain starts to fall, approaching the cliff edge

entered.detail: distant view of forested valley becoming visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, the forest opens slightly and rain begins to fall. The rocky embankment falls behind while a distant valley view emerges ahead through the trees. The path remains a dirt trail surrounded by dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking vast forested valley

events.description: character stops at cliff edge to look out over the valley
character resumes walking along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: pausing at the cliff edge to take in the panoramic view of the valley before continuing along the path

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formations at the cliff edge
expansive view of treetops covering the valley floor below

segments.scene_description: The character reaches an open cliff edge overlooking a vast forested valley. Rain continues to fall as the character stops briefly to observe the panoramic view. Large rock formations sit at the cliff's edge while the distant forest canopy stretches out below under the overcast sky.

agents.ego_description: walking away from the cliff edge back into the denser forest area

entered.detail: dense trees returning as the path moves away from the cliff

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the cliff overlook and returns to a more enclosed forest trail. Large boulders appear alongside the path as the valley view falls behind. The rain continues as the character walks through the dense woodland area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense pine forest that opens into a panoramic cliffside vista before returning to the enclosed woodland. It begins with the character walking along a narrow dirt trail bordered by a rocky embankment, just as a rider on horseback overtakes them from behind. As the character continues forward, the forest opens slightly and a light rain begins to fall, gradually revealing a distant valley through the trees. The scene then expands as the character reaches an open cliff edge, pausing briefly to observe a vast forested canopy and large rock formations under the overcast sky. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the overlook and return to the enclosed trail, passing large boulders while the valley view fades behind them into the rainy woodland.
